kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

test.name: Login And Swap Shift In Beeway

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: Typing text 'JLIM' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder="Enter Username"])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.arg: Textfield with placeholder ${PLACEHOLDER} filled with value ${VALUE}

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Alert Should Be Present
kw.doc: Verifies that an alert is present and by default, accepts it.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//li[.//div[contains(@class,'date') and normalize-space()='25']]//h4[normalize-space()='Jessica ILM']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'user-section')][1][.//span[contains(@class,'shift-tme') and normalize-space()='19:00-07:00']]'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Shift not found for ${DOCTOR_NAME} on ${VALIDATION_DATE} with timing ${SHIFT_TIME}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✅ Shift for Dr.${DOCTOR_NAME} at ${SHIFT_TIME} on ${VALIDATION_DATE} found in Doctor Login
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
End-to-end flow: Login → Beeway → Swap Shift

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//li[.//div[contains(@class,'date') and normalize-space()='22']]//h4[normalize-space()='David AACIS']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'user-section')][1][.//span[contains(@class,'shift-tme') and normalize-space()='19:00-07:00']]'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Shift not found for ${DOCTOR_NAME} on ${DATE} with timing ${TIME}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✅ Shift for Dr.${DOCTOR_NAME} at ${TIME} on ${DATE} found in Doctor Login
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Mouse Over
kw.msg: Simulating Mouse Over on element 'xpath=(//li[.//div[contains(@class,'date') and normalize-space()='22']])[1]//h4[normalize-space()='David AACIS']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'user-section')][1][.//span[contains(@class,'shift-tme') and normalize-space()='19:00-07:00']]'.
kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=(//li[.//div[contains(@class,'date') and normalize-space()='22']])[1]//h4[normalize-space()='David AACIS']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'user-section')][1][.//span[contains(@class,'shift-tme') and normalize-space()='19:00-07:00']]//span[normalize-space()='Swap with Jessica ILM 25/06/2026 - 19:00 - 07:00']' contains exact text 'Swap with Jessica ILM 25/06/2026 - 19:00 - 07:00'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression ["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='22']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='22']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"]' is not a valid XPath expression. kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//li[descendant::div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='22']]//div[contains(@class,'user-section-list')]//div[contains(@class,'user-section')][descendant::h4[normalize-space(.)='David AACIS'] and descendant::div[contains(@class,'shift-name')]//span[contains(normalize-space(.),'N12')]]'.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=(//li[.//div[contains(@class,'date') and normalize-space()='22']])[1]//h4[normalize-space()='David AACIS']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'user-section')][1][.//span[contains(@class,'time') and normalize-space()='19:00-07:00']]//span[normalize-space()='Swap with Jessica ILM 25/06/2026 - 19:00 - 07:00']' contains exact text 'Swap with Jessica ILM 25/06/2026 - 19:00 - 07:00'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.arg: ✅ Shift '${SHIFT_NAME}' found for ${REPLACE_USER} on ${DATE} in Admin Login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.msg: Typing text 'rgarikapati' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder="Enter Username"])[1]'.

kw.name: Validate Swap Shift from Admin Login
Validate shift from Admin Login
Login and Goto Dashboard
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Enter Login Credentials' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Enter Login Credentials' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.status: Text 'Enter Login Credentials' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Shift not found for ${REPLACE_USER} on ${DATE} with shift name ${SHIFT_NAME}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✅ Shift '${SHIFT_NAME}' found for ${REPLACE_USER} on ${DATE} in Admin Login
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✅ Shift for Dr.${DOCTOR_NAME} at ${SHIFT_TIME} on ${VALIDATION_DATE} found in Admin Login
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: End-to-end flow: Login → Beeway → Swap Shift
test.status: Text 'Enter Login Credentials' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
